song.title: Oh, How I Need You
song.lyrics: [V1] Lord, I find You in the seeking Lord, I find You in the doubt And to know You is to love You And to know so little else [C] I need You, Oh, how I need You Oh, how I need You, Oh, how I need You [V2] Lord, I find You in the morning Lord, I seek You every day Let my life be for Your glory Woven in Your threads of grace [B] Light, glorious, light I will go where You shine Break the dawn, crack the skies Make the way bright for me In Your light, I will find All I need, all I need is You
song.author: All Sons and Daughters
